query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.accountName, p.bankName, p.accountNumber, urc.cities, p.createdAt 
FROM partners p 
LEFT JOIN user_role_cities urc ON p.userId = urc.userId AND urc.role = 'cityPartner'
ORDER BY p.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.accountName, p.bankName, p.accountNumber, urc.cities, p.createdAt 
FROM partners p 
LEFT JOIN user_role_cities urc ON p.userId = urc.userId AND urc.role = 'cityPartner'
ORDER BY p.id;
